raw_title: Navigating the AI Hype: Chinese Journalists’ Algorithmic Imaginaries and Role Perceptions in Reporting Emerging Technologies
title_en: Navigating the AI Hype: Chinese Journalists’ Algorithmic Imaginaries and Role Perceptions in Reporting Emerging Technologies
title_zh: 驾驭人工智能热潮：中国记者在报道新兴技术中的算法想象与角色认知
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨中国记者如何理解和应对人工智能等新兴技术带来的挑战。它关注记者们对算法的看法以及他们在报道这些技术时如何看待自己的角色。
plain_summary_en: This study explores how Chinese journalists understand and respond to the challenges posed by emerging technologies like artificial intelligence. It focuses on journalists' views of algorithms and how they perceive their roles when reporting on these technologies.
research_direction_zh: 研究数字时代新闻工作者的专业身份与技术适应，特别是在非西方语境下。
research_direction_en: Investigating the professional identity and technological adaptation of journalists in the digital age, particularly in non-Western contexts.
